projects.title: Operation Metasploit: Full System Takeover
projects.description: Perform a complete penetration test against the Metasploitable lab environment. Scan, enumerate, exploit, escalate privileges, and establish persistence.

projects.title: Web Warrior: OWASP Top 10 Audit
projects.description: Conduct a thorough security assessment of a vulnerable web application (DVWA/Mutillidae). Identify and exploit at least five OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, document findings, and provide remediation advice.

projects.title: Red Team Rumble: Wi-Fi to Domain Admin
projects.description: Simulate a full attack chain starting from a wireless network compromise, pivoting to internal systems, performing Active Directory enumeration, and capturing the Domain Admin flag. Produce a professional pentest report.
